mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_schedule_favorite WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND task_id = #{task_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_schedule_favorite (user_id, task_id, create_time) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{task_id}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM app_schedule_favorite WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND task_id = #{task_id}
